## Scope

## Checks
- [ ] I confirmed this change belongs in this standalone repo.
- [ ] I updated docs, tests, or examples where needed.
- [ ] I avoided generated caches, build output, and local-only artifacts.
- [ ] I noted any follow-up publishing or GitHub-setting work.

## Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest`).
- [ ] New tests added for changed behavior.
- [ ] Coverage threshold met (≥ 70%).
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check .`).
- [ ] Type checking passes (`pyright`).

## Spatial Accuracy
- [ ] Geometry operations produce correct results for all supported types (Point, LineString, Polygon, Multi*).
- [ ] CRS assumptions are documented for any distance/area computations.
- [ ] Benchmark/comparison results are unchanged (or differences are explained).
